text:
{"type":"task_assignment","taskId":"10","subject":"UI/UX review and polish using ui-ux-pro-max patterns","description":"Review and polish the entire builder page UI/UX using the ui-ux-pro-max skill patterns:
- Review layout proportions and responsiveness
- Ensure consistent spacing, colors, and typography
- Polish animations and transitions (Framer Motion)
- Improve visual hierarchy and readability
- Ensure dark-on-light theme consistency with rest of app
- Polish the terminal output colors and formatting
- Review the wizard for clarity and usability
- Check all interactive states (hover, focus, active, disabled)
- Ensure no emoji in UI (use Lucide icons)
- Check accessibility basics (contrast, focus indicators)
- Polish loading and empty states
- Review error displays
Use the /ui-ux-pro-max skill for guidance on design patterns.","assignedBy":"team-lead","timestamp":"2026-02-27T21:29:39.830Z"}
